seo.title: Ennavo Ennavo Lyrics Priyamanavale
seo.description: Full Ennavo Ennavo songs lyrics, Priyamanavale Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: S.A.Rajkumar, Singer(s): Hariharan, Mahalakshmi Iyer.
seo.keywords: Priyamanavale, S.A.Rajkumar, Hariharan, Mahalakshmi Iyer, Ennavo Ennavo full lyrics, Priyamanavale songs lyrics, Ennavo Ennavo lyrics snippets, Ennavo Ennavo WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Ennavo Ennavo lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennavo Ennavo, the protagonists express their deep love and connection, reflecting the essence of romance that permeates the movie Priyamanavale. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, conveys a sense of longing and devotion. This song plays a pivotal role in the film, highlighting the emotional bond between the characters. It evokes feelings of warmth and affection, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennavo Ennavo from Priyamanavale is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully showcases the enchanting voices of Hariharan and Mahalakshmi Iyer. With S.A. Rajkumar's melodious composition, this song evokes deep emotions and transports listeners to a world of love and longing. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with every heartbeat.
stanzaMeanings: I am not in your presence, what can I say? There are no words here.
I will merge with your breath, I will live until your life lasts.
Will I be yours and you mine, oh beloved?
I am not in your presence, what can I say? There are no words here.
Thinking of the rain, I will come as an umbrella, will I come as an umbrella?
Holding your hand, I will smile, will I grow for you?
Until the dawn comes, you are my home. I will ask for what is needed.
You are half and I am half, together we are complete. I will give you half of my heart.
I am not in your presence, what can I say? There are no words here.
I will be like the sky, will I be seen without a roof?
I will come as a dream, I will stay as a vision.
Many nights will pass in silence, many full moons will be seen.
I need to give you a precious gift, I need your life to be with me.
I am not in your presence, what can I say? There are no words here.
I have merged with your breath, I will live until your life lasts.
Will I be yours and you mine, oh beloved? Oh beloved, oh beloved.
